title: Automated Digital Product Delivery with Crypto Explained for Digital Creators for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You’re a creator in Nigeria, Kenya, or Venezuela. You’ve got an ebook, course, or template ready to sell. But PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad won’t let you collect payments. Your buyers can’t use their local cards. Crypto is your only option—but how do you automate delivery without coding or KYC headaches? This is the problem we’ve solved for hundreds of creators. Here’s how it works.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery with crypto means your buyers pay in Bitcoin, USDT, or any of 300+ coins, and your product (ebook, template, font, etc.) is instantly delivered to their email or download link. No manual intervention. No waiting. The system verifies the payment on-chain, generates a PDF receipt, and triggers delivery—all in seconds. This matters because it removes the middleman. No PayPal freezes. No Stripe bans. No Gumroad fees. You control the process. Your buyers get instant access. It’s global, permissionless, and fully automated.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Here’s the breakdown: Your buyer sends crypto to your wallet address. The payment processor (like NOWPayments) detects the transaction on the blockchain. Once confirmed, it triggers a webhook to your delivery system. The system verifies the payment amount, generates a unique download link or email, and sends it to the buyer. For physical products, it can even generate shipping labels. The key is the webhook—a real-time notification that connects payment to delivery. No APIs to manage. No servers to host. It’s a bot engine running in the background, 24/7, handling every transaction.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This is for creators in restricted countries or those selling to buyers who can’t use traditional payment methods. If you’re in Pakistan selling Notion templates, Ghana selling beats, or Iran selling plugins, this is for you. It’s also for solo developers building crypto-native stores. Why? Because it solves the two biggest problems: payment collection and automated delivery. No need to beg friends in the US to set up a Stripe account. No need to manually email files after every sale. It’s a one-time setup, lifetime access solution.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Three core components: 1. **Payment Processor** (NOWPayments) handles crypto transactions without KYC. 2. **Delivery Engine** (Core Shop Engine, $49.99) automates file delivery, email notifications, and PDF receipts. 3. **Frontend Integration** (optional) lets buyers pay directly from their wallet via QR codes or links. The engine works standalone or integrates with your existing site. No coding required. You upload your product, set the price in USD (converted to crypto at checkout), and embed the payment link. The engine handles the rest—from payment verification to delivery.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Start by identifying your product—ebook, course, template, or font. Package it as a ZIP file. Set up a crypto wallet (e.g., Coinbase, Trust Wallet) to receive payments. Buy the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) to handle the backend. Upload your product, set the price, and generate a payment link. Embed this link on your website, social media, or email. Test the flow by buying your own product. Once it works, promote it to your audience. The first sale is the hardest—after that, the system runs itself. You focus on creating; the engine handles the rest.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

To sell an ebook online without PayPal, use a crypto payment processor like NOWPayments paired with an automated delivery system like Core Shop Engine ($49.99). Buyers pay in Bitcoin, USDT, or other coins. The system verifies the payment and instantly delivers the ebook via email or download link. No PayPal account needed. No manual work. It’s global, works in restricted countries, and requires no KYC. Your buyers get instant access, and you keep 100% control over your sales.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

Your Action Checklist

1. Package your digital product (ebook, template, font) as a ZIP file. 2. Set up a crypto wallet to receive payments. 3. Purchase the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. 4. Upload your product and set the price in USD. 5. Generate a payment link and test the flow. 6. Promote the link to your audience via social media, email, or your website. 7. Monitor your first sale—the system handles delivery automatically.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
